title: Jaws
cast: Roy Scheider, Robert Shaw, Richard Dreyfuss
description: When a great white shark terrorizes Amity Island, a sheriff, marine biologist, and shark hunter must stop it.

title: Star Wars: A New Hope
cast: Mark Hamill, Harrison Ford, Carrie Fisher
description: A farm boy joins a rebellion to rescue a princess and destroy an evil empire's planet-killing superweapon.

title: Halloween
cast: Jamie Lee Curtis, Donald Pleasence, Nick Castle
description: A masked killer escapes from a mental institution and returns to his hometown on Halloween night.

title: Alien
cast: Sigourney Weaver, John Hurt, Tom Skerritt
description: The crew of a commercial spacecraft encounters a deadly extraterrestrial creature after investigating a distress call.

title: The Shining
cast: Jack Nicholson, Shelley Duvall, Danny Lloyd
description: A writer and his family move into an isolated hotel for the winter where a sinister presence drives him to madness.

title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
cast: Harrison Ford, Karen Allen, Paul Freeman
description: Archaeologist Indiana Jones races against Nazi forces to find the legendary Ark of the Covenant.

title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
cast: Henry Thomas, Drew Barrymore, Dee Wallace
description: A lonely boy befriends a gentle alien stranded on Earth and helps him find his way home.

title: Poltergeist
cast: Craig T. Nelson, JoBeth Williams, Heather O'Rourke
description: A suburban family is terrorized by malicious ghosts that communicate through their television set.

title: Tootsie
cast: Dustin Hoffman, Jessica Lange, Bill Murray
description: A struggling actor dresses as a woman to get a part in a soap opera, finding unexpected success.

title: Scarface
cast: Al Pacino, Michelle Pfeiffer, Steven Bauer
description: A Cuban refugee rises to the top of Miami's drug trade only to see his empire crumble.

title: Return of the Jedi
cast: Mark Hamill, Harrison Ford, Carrie Fisher
description: The Rebel Alliance attempts to destroy the second Death Star and redeem Darth Vader.

title: Ghostbusters
cast: Bill Murray, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Ernie Hudson
description: Three parapsychology professors start a ghost-catching business in New York City.

title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
cast: Harrison Ford, Kate Capshaw, Ke Huy Quan
description: Indiana Jones is tasked to recover a magical stone and free enslaved children from a cult.

title: The Terminator
cast: Arnold Schwarzenegger, Linda Hamilton, Michael Biehn
description: A cyborg assassin is sent back in time to kill a woman whose son will lead a future resistance.

title: Beverly Hills Cop
cast: Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton
description: A street-smart Detroit cop travels to Beverly Hills to investigate his friend's murder.

title: A Nightmare on Elm Street
cast: Heather Langenkamp, Robert Englund, Johnny Depp
description: A disfigured dream-stalker terrorizes teenagers in their sleep, killing them in reality.

title: Back to the Future
cast: Michael J. Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson
description: A teen is accidentally sent 30 years into the past and must ensure his parents fall in love.

title: The Breakfast Club
cast: Emilio Estevez, Molly Ringwald, Judd Nelson
description: Five high school students from different cliques spend a Saturday in detention together.

title: Commando
cast: Arnold Schwarzenegger, Rae Dawn Chong, Alyssa Milano
description: A retired special forces colonel must rescue his kidnapped daughter from a dictator.

title: Stand By Me
cast: Wil Wheaton, River Phoenix, Jerry O'Connell
description: Four boys hike into the Oregon woods to find a missing body, growing up along the way.

title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
cast: Matthew Broderick, Alan Ruck, Mia Sara
description: A high school slacker convinces his friends to skip school for a day of fun in Chicago.

title: Aliens
cast: Sigourney Weaver, Michael Biehn, Bill Paxton
description: Ripley returns to the planet where she first encountered the alien, this time with marines.

title: Platoon
cast: Charlie Sheen, Tom Berenger, Willem Dafoe
description: A naive soldier in Vietnam is torn between two sergeants with opposing views of war.

title: Dirty Dancing
cast: Jennifer Grey, Patrick Swayze, Jerry Orbach
description: A teenage girl falls in love with the dance instructor at her family's summer resort.

title: Predator
cast: Arnold Schwarzenegger, Carl Weathers, Jesse Ventura
description: A special forces team in a Central American jungle is hunted by an extraterrestrial hunter.

title: Lethal Weapon
cast: Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Gary Busey
description: A suicidal detective is partnered with a family man cop as they tackle a drug smuggling ring.

title: RoboCop
cast: Peter Weller, Nancy Allen, Kurtwood Smith
description: A murdered cop is rebuilt as a cyborg law enforcer in a crime-ridden future Detroit.

title: Wall Street
cast: Michael Douglas, Charlie Sheen, Daryl Hannah
description: A young stockbroker is seduced by greed while learning from a ruthless corporate raider.

title: Die Hard
cast: Bruce Willis, Alan Rickman, Bonnie Bedelia
description: A New York cop fights terrorists who have taken over a Los Angeles skyscraper on Christmas Eve.

title: Rain Man
cast: Dustin Hoffman, Tom Cruise, Valeria Golino
description: A selfish man discovers his autistic brother and takes him on a cross-country road trip.

title: Coming to America
cast: Eddie Murphy, Arsenio Hall, James Earl Jones
description: An African prince comes to Queens, New York, to find a wife on his own terms.

title: Batman
cast: Michael Keaton, Jack Nicholson, Kim Basinger
description: The caped crusader battles the Joker's reign of terror over Gotham City.

title: Dead Poets Society
cast: Robin Williams, Ethan Hawke, Robert Sean Leonard
description: An inspirational English teacher at a boys' prep school encourages his students to seize the day.

title: Home Alone
cast: Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern
description: An eight-year-old is accidentally left behind when his family flies to Paris, and must defend his home.

title: Total Recall
cast: Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sharon Stone, Rachel Ticotin
description: A construction worker discovers his memories may be implanted and travels to Mars to uncover the truth.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
cast: Anthony Hopkins, Jodie Foster, Ted Levine
description: An FBI trainee must seek the help of an imprisoned cannibal to catch a serial killer.

title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
cast: Arnold Schwarzenegger, Linda Hamilton, Edward Furlong
description: A reprogrammed Terminator must protect John Connor from a liquid metal killing machine.

title: Boyz n the Hood
cast: Ice Cube, Cuba Gooding Jr., Morris Chestnut
description: Three childhood friends grow up in South Central Los Angeles and try to escape gang violence.

title: Point Break
cast: Keanu Reeves, Patrick Swayze, Gary Busey
description: An FBI agent goes undercover with a gang of surfers who rob banks while wearing president masks.

title: Wayne's World
cast: Mike Myers, Dana Carvey, Rob Lowe
description: Two friends from Aurora, Illinois run a public access show from their basement.

title: Reservoir Dogs
cast: Harvey Keitel, Tim Roth, Michael Madsen
description: The aftermath of a diamond heist gone wrong, as strangers suspect each other of being a police informant.

title: Unforgiven
cast: Clint Eastwood, Gene Hackman, Morgan Freeman
description: A retired outlaw takes on one last job to avenge a mutilated prostitute in Wyoming.

title: Jurassic Park
cast: Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum
description: A billionaire's dinosaur theme park goes catastrophically wrong when the creatures escape.

title: Schindler's List
cast: Liam Neeson, Ben Kingsley, Ralph Fiennes
description: A German businessman saves over 1,000 Jewish workers by employing them in his factories during WWII.

title: The Fugitive
cast: Harrison Ford, Tommy Lee Jones, Sela Ward
description: A wrongly convicted doctor escapes prison and is hunted by a relentless marshal while searching for the real killer.

title: Forrest Gump
cast: Tom Hanks, Robin Wright, Gary Sinise
description: A kind-hearted man from Alabama inadvertently becomes part of several key historical events.

title: Pulp Fiction
cast: John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman
description: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, and a crime boss intertwine in four stories of crime.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
cast: Tim Robbins, Morgan Freeman, Bob Gunton
description: A banker wrongly convicted of murder finds hope and friendship in Shawshank prison.

title: Speed
cast: Keanu Reeves, Sandra Bullock, Dennis Hopper
description: A bomb on a bus will detonate if the vehicle drops below 50 mph. An LAPD officer must stop it.

title: Heat
cast: Al Pacino, Robert De Niro, Val Kilmer
description: A veteran detective and a master thief play a cat-and-mouse game across Los Angeles.
